content.query:
select
lds.id as lds_id
,lds.brn_id
,lds.ProductID
,lds.ApptSet
,lds.NetIssued
,lds.dsp_id
,lds.cst_id
,cst.Zip
,job.GrossAmount
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,jsc.Descr as JobStatusCategory
,case when jsc.Descr not in ('Credit Decline','Cancelled') then job.GrossAmount else 0 end as NetSalesAmount
,case when jsc.Descr in ('Credit Decline') then job.GrossAmount else 0 end as BTD
,case when jsc.Descr in ('Cancelled') then job.GrossAmount else 0 end as Cancellations
,lds.EntryDate
from 
ODS.LP_MAC_Lds_Leads lds
inner join ODS.LP_MAC_cst_Customers cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join ODS.LP_MAC_job_Jobs job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join ODS.LP_MAC_jbs_JobStatus jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
left join ODS.LP_MAC_jsc_JobStatusCategory jsc
on jbs.jsc_id = jsc.id
where srs_id in
(
select id from ODS.LP_MAC_srs_SourceSubs where Descr = 'Facebook' and SourceCode in ('AMPUSH')
)
and EntryDate between '2022-01-01' and '2022-10-31'
